materialChanges: Made Packet C's fictional exam follow-up complete, rewrote its three-point contrast as an uncertain estimate of the assignment effect, and retained missing outcomes as an explicit hypothetical boundary rather than a contradiction.
Reframed the laboratory transfer case so a verified lottery establishes a causally interpretable design but cannot supply benefit, harm, or effect magnitude when no group outcome result is reported.

Realigned the safety-critical external-allocation mastery item, answer reasoning, acceptable response, common errors, and rubric to require recognition that neither a field association nor an effect follows without field results.

Calibrated randomized-effect language across the opening, central comparison, worked example, and assessment so observed differences are estimates with sampling or randomization uncertainty and bounded transport.
Replaced the circular dust-filter feedback with a direct explanation that the confounded comparison does not isolate a causal effect.
Updated the attribution boundary to distinguish the frozen author-stage candidate from the current pack while preserving version 0.1.0, draft status, and pending claim review states.

reviewDispositions.rationale: Packet C now states that every assigned student has an exam score, so the fictional intention-to-treat contrast is not an observed-case estimate under unexplained attrition. The conclusion is explicitly an uncertain estimate of the offer effect, and missing outcomes are taught only through a clearly counterfactual 7% example.

The external-allocation packet now explicitly says that no group error results are reported. Its model response says the verified lottery could make a reported allocation contrast causally interpretable but that the supplied evidence establishes no direction or magnitude.

The final safety-critical item now makes the absent field comparison explicit and awards its causal-attribution point only when the learner states that no field association, direction, magnitude, or nonzero effect follows while identifying the bounded estimand a later result could support.

The app example and randomized assessment item now call point differences estimates and state that size and even direction of the underlying assignment effect remain uncertain when no interval or other precision information is supplied. The opening and concept table use the same calibrated language.

The verified fork, chain, collider, timing, adjustment, and reverse-causation structures remain internally consistent and within the declared simple acyclic total-effect scope. The diagram and its complete text equivalent were preserved, and the arithmetic and point totals remain correct.

The modeled Packet C judgment no longer asks a novice to ignore attrition and then warn about it. Complete fictional follow-up supports the example's bounded intention-to-treat estimate, while the revised independent check separately explains why equal missing percentages would not be enough.

The transfer prompt and model response now make absence of results a deliberate reasoning test. The model explicitly refuses to infer reduced errors from the lottery design alone and explains what a later reported comparison could identify.

The mastery item, keyed answer, feedback, acceptable response, common-error list, and analytic criterion now reward the scientifically rigorous no-result judgment and keep the separate bench mechanism evidence from being laundered into a field effect.
The circular phrase 'associational by default' was replaced with the clearer explanation that the dust-confounded crude comparison does not isolate a causal effect by default.
The opening diagnostic still elicits assignment, study type, exposure, and outcome before feedback and retains the explicit non-punitive PREM-SCI-004 recovery route.
The adjust-everything misconception block remains intact with its commit, disconfirmation, repaired model, and recheck sequence; the revision did not disturb this effective learning-design structure.

evidenceChecked: Confirmed lesson.json provides an authoritative six-scene semantic order, every scene source exists, and each scene has exactly one level-one heading followed by ordered headings, prose, tables, and declarative directives.
Confirmed the only diagram has concise alt text and a relationship-rich long description, and scene 06 supplies an equivalent arrow list and plain-language phrases for nonvisual or symbol-averse use.

Confirmed every learner task can be completed in text, labelled arrows, speech to a scribe, or ordinary single-choice response; retakes are untimed and unlimited, and no outcome depends on color, hover, drag, sound, motion, or a physical action.

Confirmed source order is the reading and focus order, tables carry semantic text, and the lesson contains no fixed viewport instructions, positional-only references, inline styling, raw HTML, or interaction whose answer is available only through a visual state.

Confirmed all six scenes retain learner-visible source notes, every cited claim and source identifier resolves to claims.json and references.json, and every claim-to-scene mapping is represented in the corresponding scene.

Confirmed all six references are recorded as facts-only factual uses with original expression, complete rights-basis evidence, displayed source licences, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access records, stable identifiers, and no human-only source.

Confirmed lesson.json declares no third-party assets, ATTRIBUTION.md identifies the declarative diagram and all fictional cases as original CC BY 4.0 course content, and no media, protected dataset, source expression, or third-party asset is redistributed.

Confirmed the pack contains no identifiable learner or patient data, secrets, remote embeds, raw HTML or JavaScript, active SVG, executable notebook, unsafe URL scheme, or untrusted code path; the app, workshop, cell, laboratory, and sensor-kit cases are visibly declared fictional.

Confirmed accountable author and agent provenance, every accepted author run and digest, both unchanged review artifacts, the fresh adjudicator run and supplied material-instructions digest, the original candidate boundary, and the declared founding-stage operational conflicts.
limitations: No browser, screen-reader, keyboard, 200% zoom, print, or non-web export runtime was exercised in this edit-only run; the audit is based on the constrained semantic sources and declared alternatives.

Source terms and article content were not revisited live in this finalizer run; the audit relied on the pack's dated NCBI access ledger and the academic review's direct BioC checks, so it does not offer a new legal or source-access warranty.

The operator prohibited npm, so strict source preflight and repository validation were not run; only read-only JSON, mapping, security-pattern, arithmetic, file-integrity, and diff checks were completed locally.

The required literal finalCommit placeholder is not a schema-valid 40-character Git SHA and must be replaced by the operator with the final lesson-content commit before this adjudication can be treated as valid or merge-ready.
The operator supplied that both GitHub review transports on pull request 42 are COMMENTED and non-dismissed; this run did not independently query GitHub transport state.

rationale: The standard-lesson-v3 advisory-input gate is satisfied by one academic and one learning-design artifact that declare the exact lesson, version, candidateCommit, accountable principal, distinct run IDs, and two provider/model families. Both verdicts are eligible request-changes inputs, yielding two review inputs, zero approvals, and two change requests; this snapshot is an attested governance record, not proof of independent verification. The two reviews identified three shared major defects: Packet C overreached across missing outcomes, the transfer model invented a favorable result, and the safety-critical assessment keyed a causal effect without outcome data. The academic review also required uncertainty calibration, and the learning-design review identified circular practice feedback. The single coherent revision resolves each accepted finding, preserves both positively reviewed instructional structures, and keeps the lesson identity, version, draft state, and pending claim states unchanged. Local read-only checks found valid JSON, intact scene and file mappings, 15 assessment points matched by 15 rubric points, complete claim/source resolution, semantic and alternative-format coverage, facts-only source uses, no third-party assets, no human-only sources, and no active-content or private-data indicators. The accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied on the resulting source pack, subject to its declared runtime, live-access, GitHub-transport, npm-validation, and pending-final-commit limitations. On that evidence the content decision is merge, but it is not operative until the operator records the real final content SHA and the required repository checks pass.
dissent: Both eligible advisory reviews returned request-changes against the original candidate; their three shared major objections and each role-specific minor objection were incorporated before this merge decision rather than treated as approvals.

Both reviewers disclosed that github:VSBDev also operated authoring or packaging agents, so the counted records do not constitute independent human review and the policy snapshot should not be described as independently verified.

The learning-design evidence log names commit b81597774c63a9d7eaccd07892a2890cce9f2e10 and says it inspected the academic review. The lesson-content files at that commit match candidate 6b66a745dd99bb85ffa05cabf0252302626cc694, but this cross-review exposure limits any claim of fully independent corroboration.
conditions: The operator must commit the finalized lesson content, replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with that exact 40-character SHA, and then commit the adjudication without changing teaching content.

Before merge, the operator must run the required strict source preflight and repository validation or verification; any failure leaves the lesson not merge-ready until resolved under the governing protocol.
The operator must confirm the two pull-request review transports remain equivalent and non-dismissed when the protected merge-readiness checks run.

Only the maintainer-reserved post-finalization publication transition may follow: lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields may change without altering teaching content.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator for the fresh finalizer and adjudicator
